title: senecio santelicis
intro: Senecio santelicis, also known as Groundsel, is a biennial or annual plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Groundsel include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and support the immune system. Groundsel can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture or dried powder in various herbal preparations.
